title: The Forgotten Friends
description: Adds mobs to the game that didn't win the mob votes
body:
# Bring Back the Forgotten!

Ever wondered what Minecraft would look like if your favorite mob vote candidates had actually won? With Fotgotten Friends, you don’t have to wonder anymore! This mod adds a collection of iconic, fan-favorite mobs that never made it into the game — until now. Though, there are slight differences and original content that were not mentioned in the mob votes.

Needs **"Kleiders Custom Renderer API"** to run. Will crash in some cases without it.


## **Entities**
### Crab (Neutral)
- Found in Mangrove Swamps
- Drop Crab Arms
### Iceologer (Hostile)
- Found in snowy or cold mountain biomes and Iceologer Igloos
- Drops an Ice Wand, ice, and emeralds
### Wildfire (Boss)
- Found in the Nether Wastes or by using a Nether Totem
- Drops a Heat Gem
### Great Hunger (Hostile until tamed)
- Found in Lush Caves
- Can be used to both enchant items by feeding it gold ingots/blocks and disenchant items by feeding it iron nuggets after taming it with iron ingots, gold ingots, golden food, or diamonds
### Glare (Passive)
- Found in Lush Caves
- Moves to the darkest and closest block to it
### Moobloom (Passive)
- Found in Flower Forests
- Leaves behind a trail of buttercups
- Can be sheared into a normal cow and milked with a bucket or mushroom stew
### Rascal (Passive)
- Found in any place in the overworld below y-level 0
- Runs away from the player after being interacted with.
- Being found three times leaves the player with rewards
### Termites (Neutral)
- Found in savanna biomes
- Search the area for plants and wood to grow their nest
### Copper Golem (Passive)
- Created by placing a lightning rod against a block of unoxidized, unwaxed copper
- Presses copper buttons near it periodically
- Slowly oxidizes until it turns into a statue, can be wazed to prevent this, or axed to unwax it


## **Items**
### Backpack
Dropped by beating a Rascal in hide and seek. Can hold up to 18 stacks of items
### Nether Backpack
Created by smithing a Backpack with a netherite ingot. Can hold up to 36 stacks of items
### End Backpack
Created by smithing a Nether Backpack with end stone bricks. Can hold up to 56 stacks of items
### Buttercup
Flower found in Flower Forests and by killing or shearing Mooblooms
### Crab Arm
Dropped by Crabs on death. Holding it increases the player's block and entity range
### Fortified Flames
Crafted with lava buckets, blaze rods, and a Heat Gem. Converts damage the player takes into damage to the item. Heals slowly over time
### Heat Gem
Dropped by the Wildfire
### Ice Wand
Dropped by Iceologers or found in Iceologer Igloo treasure rooms. Uses ice blocks as ammo and spawns Iceologer ice chunks above entities hit
### Inferno Helmet
Crafted with a netherite helmet, blaze rods, and a Heat Gem. Spawns a friendly Blaze when worn that will attack what you attack
### Inferno Totem
Crafted with blaze powder, netherite scraps, and blaze rods. Interacting with it in the Nether spawns a Wildfire
### Smoke Bomb
Makes the player truly invisible and gives them a speed boost. Dropped when beating a Rascal at hide and seek
### Freezing Potions
Made with ice blocks
### The Moon
Obtained when completing the "Steal the Moon" advancement if GetCelestialBodies gamerule is set to "true". Does a large amount of damage
### The Sun
Obtained when completing the "Actually Reach for the Stars" advancement if GetCelestialBodies gamerule is set to "true". Can be thrown to cause large explosions



## **Advancements**

The rest of the advancements are rather self-explanitory, but the following ones are ones with vague descriptions or are difficult to get without explanation.

### Actually Reach for the Stars
Go to at or above the build limit, look upwards while the sun is in the middle of the sky, and interact with a Crab Arm
### Commander In Chief
Be near entities tamed by you (30 wolves, 5 Great Hungers, and 15 cats), all at once
### Iceologer's Revenge
Be near 500 glow squids upon them being crushed to death by ice chunks
### Invasive Species
Bring a tamed Great Hunger near a pufferfish
### Out of its Diet
Feed a Great Hunger a Crab Arm
### Over the Weight Limit
Feed a Great Hunger four gold blocks at once
### Steal the Moon
Go to at or above the build limit, look upwards while the moon is in the middle of the sky, and interact with a Crab Arm
### Two-Timing
Enchant an item with an enchanting table while near a tamed Great Hunger
### Who's the Iceologer Now?
Kill an Iceologer with an Ice Wand

## **Enchantments**
### Compacting (Ice Wand)
Increases the damage of ice chunks by .75 hearts per level
### Elongate (Crab Arm)
Increases block reach by .75 blocks per level
### Extending (Crab Arm)
Increases entity reach by .75 blocks per level
### Icing (Ice Wand)
Makes ice chunks freeze entities
### Rapid-Fire (Inferno Helmet)
Increases the rate the blaze servant fires fireballs
